items.name: claude-spyglass
items.description: ClaudeSpyglass is a local DevTools for Claude Code CLI that intercepts and analyzes every request in real time. It tracks prompts, tool calls, and execution traces, providing structured logs, token usage, and latency insights to help developers understand and debug AI behavior.

items.name: agentic-web-stack
items.description: AI-Agent-Ready Fullstack TypeScript Template — TanStack Start + Hono + tRPC + Prisma + Better-Auth
